summary: Backend-only test for session type synchronization bug fix. Today is Friday (dayNumber=5). All 14 tests passed. Plan generates correct calendar day numbers (Mon=1, Tue=2, Thu=4, Fri=5) and GET /api/plan/session/today correctly returns Dynamic Effort Upper for Friday.
critical_code_review_comments: plan_generator.py uses SPLIT_TEMPLATES (old 1-based sequential numbering) to set split var but then correctly uses DAY_MAPS for actual session building — the SPLIT_TEMPLATES variable is now unused/dead code. Low priority cleanup.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/profile/intake called to generate test plan (4-day frequency, strength goal)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Today (Friday, dayNumber=5) was used in testing. All session type sync tests passed. CONJUGATE_CALENDAR fallback confirmed working. Plan correctly assigns: Mon(1)=ME Lower, Tue(2)=ME Upper, Thu(4)=DE Lower, Fri(5)=DE Upper.
rca_of_issue: Bug was: old plan_generator used sequential day numbers 1-4 instead of calendar day numbers (Mon=1...Fri=5). Fix: DAY_MAPS dict added with correct calendar day numbers. get_today_session added CONJUGATE_CALENDAR fallback (second-try block) to find session by sessionType when dayNumber doesn't match today. Both fixes verified working.
